input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.3.1.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.3.1.4
            TITLE: each hydraulic circuit must have its own fluid reserve using separate reservoirs or an oem

            CONTENT:
            rule T.3.1.4: Each hydraulic circuit must have its own fluid reserve using separate reservoirs or an OEM
T.3.1.4 Each hydraulic circuit must have its own fluid reserve using separate reservoirs or an OEM 
style reservoir

final_answer: Each hydraulic circuit must have its own fluid reserve using separate reservoirs or an OEM style reservoir
